# Together

> Together is a completely free, browser-based video meeting platform.
> No downloads, no sign-up, no cost — create a meeting room, share the
> link, and start a video call in seconds.

Website: https://together.eventxkart.space/

## What Together does

- Free video and audio meetings with multiple participants, directly in
  the web browser (desktop, tablet, and mobile)
- One-click meeting creation — the host gets a shareable room link
- Waiting room: the host is notified when someone asks to join and can
  admit or deny them; the host can also remove participants
- One-tap screen sharing with automatic camera restore
- In-call text chat with notification sounds and unread indicators
- Mute indicators, click-to-pin video tiles, participant list
- Camera and microphone selection before joining
- Light and dark themes; installable as a Progressive Web App

## How it works

Together uses WebRTC for peer-to-peer video/audio (with a TURN relay
fallback for restrictive networks), Socket.IO for signaling and chat,
and runs entirely in the browser — nothing to install.

## Pricing

Together is 100% free. There are no accounts, subscriptions, paid
tiers, or hidden charges.

## Who is it for

Remote teams, online classes and tutoring, interviews, quick
client calls, and friends or family catching up — anyone who needs an
instant, private video meeting without creating an account.

## Privacy notes

- Meeting rooms use unguessable link IDs and are not indexed by search
  engines
- Guests enter only after the host admits them
- Video and audio flow peer-to-peer between participants
